since_last: 39% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.63%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 39% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC -0.12% · Gold +0.90% · Nasdaq100 +0.75%. 39% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.63%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.63%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -2.68%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -5.31%
cards.body: Leaders: SYNA +5.23%, WDAY +1.96%, NOW +1.30%, SAP +1.29%, ADBE +1.29%. Laggards: MU -5.31%, ARM -4.78%, PWR -4.67%, MRVL -4.36%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.78% at $150.27
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.78% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
